title: cotula gymnogyne
intro: Cotula gymnogyne, also known as African cotula or cotula, is a small, annual herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. Cotula gymnogyne is often prepared for herbal use through infusion or decoction, and it can also be applied topically as a poultice or ointment.
